name: Miach
description:
__Race:__ God
__Height:__ 188 cm (6'2")
__Affiliation:__ Miach Familia

Miach is the head of the Miach Familia. Miach is a kind, compassionate, and friendly God, and has good relations with Bell and the members of the Hestia Familia, often handing out free potions to him. He has a habit of handing out free potions, causing financial problems for his Familia, and is referred to as a "natural gigolo" along with Takemikazuchi due to his friendliness toward women. He is also caring of his own Familia member Naaza Erisuis, taking out a huge loan from the Dian Cecht Familia to have a silver arm created for her.
